manuscript_alignment: Abstract/Results PARP1 expression block (n=19 LOF, n=1498 comparator, medians ~6.77 vs ~6.66, two-sided MWU p~0.605)

inputs.mbd4_lof_rule: HugoSymbol==MBD4 AND LikelyLoF==True -> ModelID in LOF set

tests.note_vs_pharmacology: GDSC2 pharmacology contrasts in this manuscript use one-sided Mann-Whitney (LOF more sensitive than WT) with WT = no somatic MBD4 mutation.

PARP1.comparator_definition: All cell lines with non-missing expression for this gene that are NOT in MBD4 LikelyLoF=True ModelID set (includes MBD4 non-LOF mutants). This reproduces manuscript PARP1 counts n=19 vs n=1498 and is NOT the same as pharmacology WT (no somatic MBD4).

RNF144A.comparator_definition: All cell lines with non-missing expression for this gene that are NOT in MBD4 LikelyLoF=True ModelID set (includes MBD4 non-LOF mutants). This reproduces manuscript PARP1 counts n=19 vs n=1498 and is NOT the same as pharmacology WT (no somatic MBD4).
